description: Editable Atlas work order candidate queue. Lower priority numbers are selected first.

candidates.title: Atlas Governance Docs
candidates.rationale: Milestone 0 is marked In Progress and governance/process documents are missing, which blocks consistent future Atlas work.
candidates.goal: Create the first Atlas governance documentation packet without changing story canon, game design, quests, dialogue, NPCs, or worldbuilding.
required_tasks: Ensure each new Atlas doc has valid frontmatter with a unique `atlas_id`.
constraints: Do not alter quests, NPCs, screen design, implementation packets, or gameplay.
Keep changes limited to governance and agent-process documentation.
dependencies: Milestone 0 architecture remains the current roadmap priority.

candidates.title: Truth Layer Diagram
candidates.rationale: Milestone 0 is blocked by governance work that is already queued, so the next nonduplicate roadmap gap is the missing Truth Layer Diagram from the Foundation priority list.
candidates.goal: Create a structural documentation work order for the missing Truth Layer Diagram, which the Atlas Roadmap lists as the next highest-priority foundation document after Cybersecurity, Gameplay, and Story bibles.
required_tasks: Define the document as a structural bridge between visible fantasy terms and hidden cybersecurity meaning.
Use only existing Atlas canon from the required reading; do not invent new story events or lore.
Add valid frontmatter with a unique `atlas_id`.
Run the Atlas validator and report the result.
constraints: Do not alter quests, NPCs, screen design, implementation packets, or gameplay.
Do not add new lore beyond relationships already established in Atlas.
dependencies: Atlas Governance Docs are already queued and should not be duplicated.
Cybersecurity Layer Bible, Gameplay Systems Bible, and Story Structure Bible already exist.

candidates.title: Home Island Gap Implementation Packets
candidates.rationale: The Home Island Object Traceability Matrix lists these as known gaps, but roadmap foundation work has higher priority.
candidates.goal: Create implementation packet work orders for known Home Island traceability gaps.
required_tasks: Keep each packet structural and implementation-facing.
Run the Atlas validator and report the result.
constraints: Do not alter existing quests, NPCs, screen design, implementation packets, or gameplay.
dependencies: Truth Layer Diagram should be planned first if it remains missing.
